allow: Bash(curl -s -i -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8000/projects -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: GET' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: authorization')
Bash(curl -s -i -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8000/projects -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: authorization,content-type')
Bash(curl -s -i -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8000/projects/abc -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: DELETE' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: authorization')
